song_name: I Can Love You Like That
version_description: Full chord tab of song. Note the key modulation in final chorus from E to F, though its a simple 1 fret move.

versions.song_name: I Can Love You Like That
I Can Love You Like That
versions.version_description: Specific, corrected chords with capo which will transpose to correct key, relabeled and fully timed sections, corrected lyrics, appropriate strum pattern.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Sittin On The Dock Of The Bay

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
They read you Cinderella[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]
You hoped it would come true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]
And one day your Prince Charming[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]
Would come rescue you[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
You like romantic movies[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]
And you never will forget[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]
The way you felt when Romeo[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]  
Kissed Juliet[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]                              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And all this time that you've been waiting[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]                    [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You don't have to wait no more[/tab]



[Chorus]
                          
I can love you like that
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I would make you my world[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]

[tab]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]

I can love you like that

(I can love you like that)[/tab]

I can love you like that[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I never make a promise[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]
I don't intend to keep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]
So when I say forever[/tab]

Forever's what I mean[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Well I'm no Cassanova[/tab]

But I swear this much is true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Asus2[/ch]
I'll be holding nothing back[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
When it comes to you[/tab]

You dream of love that's everlasting[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]                   [ch]Asus2[/ch]

[Chorus]

I can love you like that

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
If you want tenderness[/tab]
